hints.text: Chinese SAR (counts as China); plates **white front / yellow rear** (long or short); some cars carry an extra black mainland plate
Drives on the **left** (Singapore too; Taiwan drives right)
Dense city of skyscrapers & busy streets; **rural areas mountainous + subtropical green** (Singapore is very flat)
**Extremely tall apartment buildings** (taller than SG/Taiwan); wall-mounted **air conditioners** everywhere
**English + Traditional Chinese** bilingual signs (residents mainly speak Cantonese)
Grey cylindrical lamp posts (wide base, white sticker); **no striped kerbs** (unlike Singapore); grey pedestrian guardrails; rural = wooden poles only
**Yellow pedestrian crossings** (some yellow grids); white centre + white/yellow outer lines; roads often concrete
Taxi colour = region: **red** (HK Island/Kowloon), **green** (New Territories), **blue** (Lantau); double-decker buses; bright-orange sidewalk bins
